reason: AC4 drops the combined inventory_code column (and AC1/AC2 replace it with batch_number/serial_number); every prior test that seeds or asserts on inventory_code via the API or raw SQL breaks once the split migration + model/repository updates land. The Driver may refactor exactly these prior tests (dropping/replacing their inventory_code usage) alongside the split migration, carrying their still-valid intent (save-confirmation, JSON boundary, field-named validation, not-null/unique invariants, migration reversibility) forward onto the new schema shape.
